input.description: Implement a full audit trail for all symphony task transitions. Each transition should record: the task id, from-state, to-state, timestamp, the session that triggered it, the user-visible reason if provided, and any metadata from the transition payload. Store the audit trail in a separate JSONL file at runtime/symphony/audit.jsonl. Wire the audit writes into symphonyStore.ts transition method. Add a new API endpoint GET /api/symphony/:id/audit that returns the full audit trail for a given task. Update the symphony UI to show a collapsible audit trail under each task's detail view. Add smoke test coverage for the new endpoint. Update CURRENT_STATE.md.
